github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: CRITICAL: Before making ANY Railway deployment changes in this repository, you MUST: 1) Read /FLORA_DEVELOPMENT_RULES.md completely, 2) Read /SKILLS.md completely, 3) Compare your changes with last working commit using 'git diff 9dc71f6 <file>', 4) Verify alignment with working configuration. This applies even after context compaction or session restart. Never skip these steps, even for 'quick fixes'.

github.copilot.chat.welcomeMessage: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Before working on Railway deployments, read /FLORA_DEVELOPMENT_RULES.md and /SKILLS.md first. Then compare with working commit 9dc71f6.
